'''mabawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hidation|hidation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-b-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hidation|hidation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mabawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæbæwæth|mæbæwæth]] || [[word:mæbæwæj|mæbæwæj]] || [[word:mæbæwæsh|mæbæwæsh]] || [[word:mæbæwæ|mæbæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mababawath|mababawath]] || [[word:mababawaj|mababawaj]] || [[word:mababawash|mababawash]] || [[word:mababawa|mababawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mabawath|mabawath]] || [[word:mabawaj|mabawaj]] || [[word:mabawash|mabawash]] || [[word:mabawa|mabawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mabafwath|mabafwath]] || [[word:mabafwaj|mabafwaj]] || [[word:mabafwash|mabafwash]] || [[word:mabafwaf|mabafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mabawatha|mabawatha]] || [[word:mabawaja|mabawaja]] || [[word:mabawasha|mabawasha]] || [[word:mabawaka|mabawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mabawath|mabawath]] || [[word:mabawaj|mabawaj]] || [[word:mabawash|mabawash]] || [[word:mabawa|mabawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mabawathal|mabawathal]] || [[word:mabawajal|mabawajal]] || [[word:mabawashal|mabawashal]] || [[word:mabawakal|mabawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mabawathatha|mabawathatha]] || [[word:mabawajaja|mabawajaja]] || [[word:mabawashasha|mabawashasha]] || [[word:mabawaka|mabawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mabawathan|mabawathan]] || [[word:mabawajan|mabawajan]] || [[word:mabawashan|mabawashan]] || [[word:mabawakan|mabawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mabawathaoro|mabawathaoro]] || [[word:mabawajaoro|mabawajaoro]] || [[word:mabawashaoro|mabawashaoro]] || [[word:mabawakaoro|mabawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
